name: spot-the-pairs

metadata.title: Spot the Pairs — Friendly Pairs Sum Challenge
metadata.description: Tap every pill on the 8-pill board whose two numbers add up to the level's target sum (10 or 20). Race to find each match within 2 seconds for a fast-tap star bonus while preserving 3 shared lives across 4 levels. Number-bond fluency for Class 1–3.
